promotion_tool: governed dev→release promotion (copy allow-listed changed files + ZIP)
store_upload: NONE — no Chrome Web Store upload performed by this promotion
github_release: NONE — no GitHub Release created by this promotion
wildcard_host_permissions: NONE — AG-363 removed https://*/* from manifest.chrome.json and manifest.firefox.json (unchanged by this promotion)
note: Governed dev→release promotion of AG-PROMPT-386 (finance report false-negative fix) on top of the AG-384 baseline, which already promoted AG-383 (medical/health false-positive fix) and, before that, AG-382 already promoted AG-381 (HR/Employee precision fix), and AG-380 already promoted AG-378 + AG-379 (PDF Author metadata precedence + field-blind metadata confidential fix) into ZIP SHA 1c43ddfc...; none of those are re-described here as pending — they are already shipped in the prior release state and remain unchanged and confirmed present in this promotion. Exactly four allow-listed files changed since the AG-384 promotion lineage (source commit 861c939): src/detection/packs/global.ts, src/detection/signalManifest.ts, src/policy/awarenessFraming.ts, src/policy/documentClassAnchors.ts (confirmed via git diff against 861c939, restricted to the full AG-269 allow-list, and independently via a full recursive src/ tree diff between dev and release before this promotion — no other allow-listed file touched; public/manifest.chrome.json and public/manifest.firefox.json confirmed byte-identical between dev and release, no permission drift). AG-386 root cause (FINANCE_ANCHORS_MISSING, primary; FINANCE_DETECTOR_THRESHOLD_TOO_HIGH and POLICY_AGGREGATION_FINANCE_UNDERCLASSIFICATION, compounding): a confidential finance report (balance sheet, revenue, gross margin, EBITDA, P&L, budget, supplier costs) fired only as generic 'Confidentiality marker in text', and the same report without a confidentiality marker fired nothing at all. english-financial-statement's English-pack locale-confidence gate (8+ distinct function words) failed on realistic finance prose by exactly one word despite 18.5% function-word density, so the pattern never got a chance to run; separately, revenue/gross margin/net margin/EBITDA/cost of goods sold/operating expenses/supplier costs had zero pattern coverage anywhere; and hasOnlyDistributionSignals() (awarenessFraming.ts) lacked a business-sensitive exclusion, so even after adding coverage a confidential finance report was still masked behind a generic distribution-restriction frame instead of surfacing as business-sensitive. Fixed by adding new signal global-financial-report (global.ts, always-on global pack, type:'financial', severity:'high', minCount:2, deliberately excluding bare 'balance'/'margin' to preserve the AG-376 visual-balance fix), registering SIG_GLOBAL_FINANCIAL_REPORT (signalManifest.ts), adding the signal to BUSINESS_SENSITIVE_PATTERNS plus a new business-sensitive exclusion in hasOnlyDistributionSignals() (awarenessFraming.ts), and adding it to GENERIC_KEYWORD_SIGNAL_IDS (documentClassAnchors.ts) for consistency with sibling financial signals. Confidential and non-confidential finance reports both now correctly surface as FRAME_BUSINESS_SENSITIVE; layout/design 'visual balance' text remains completely clean; a single ambiguous finance word cannot trigger alone. This is a detection-pattern + policy-framing precision fix only — no RiskSignal structure, deduplication, chunking, or severity-floor change; no new CRITICAL severity or hard floor; signal-manifest count changed by exactly +1 (93->94 pack pattern IDs, 101->102 manifest constants), confirming consistent registration with no orphaned entries. AG-369/370/371/374/376/378/379/381/383 (previously promoted) remain included unchanged — all confirmed present via a byte-identical comparison of this promotion's release-built content.js/background.js against a same-session dev-built Chrome bundle (strongest available fix-presence proof; confirms the entire src/ tree, not just the four changed files, matches dev exactly), plus literal-string greps for 'global-financial-report' (AG-386), 'bonus' (AG-381), 'jan(?:uary)?' (AG-378), and 'stopImmediatePropagation' (AG-369). No manifest, permission, or host-scope change (permissions: ['storage'] only; host_permissions limited to the 6 listed patterns; no activeTab; no wildcard/https://*/*; no <all_urls>; connect-src 'none'). No telemetry, network diagnostics, or centralized logging added; no raw document content, file names, or personal data logged or persisted (production bundle strips all console.log/console.debug via terser pure_funcs, verified; zero new diagnostic calls in any changed file). docs/test-files/1.txt through 4.txt (pre-existing local material) remain uncommitted and are not part of this or any promotion; no raw operator content was committed or bundled. Dev-side verification (this promotion): tsc 0 errors; targeted keyword-precision suite (finance TP/FP) 38/38; AG-376 balance false-positive suite 14/14; AG-383 medical technical-diagnosis suite 20/20; AG-378 PDF Author metadata suite 15/15; AG-379 metadata confidential field-awareness suite 19/19; CORE 56/56; corpus gold harness 30/0/1-blocked (pre-existing, unrelated); clipboard gold harness 125/125 (incl. re-verified M&A gold fixture, English PHI positive control, and HR positive control); signal-manifest-integrity 24/24 (93->94, 101->102, exactly +1 consistent); verify-manifest 28/28; Chrome build 34/34 + 20/20 consumer-copy; Firefox build 25/25. Release-side verification: release-verify.ts 10/10 gates (type-check, build:chrome + artifact/console-strip checks, package:chrome + no-maps/no-TS guards, license UX guardrail, no-activity-record, message-handler safety, storage manager, storage hardening, signal-manifest integrity, manifest verification); ZIP contents confirmed as exactly the 14 expected production files (no .map/.ts/reports/dev URLs/prompt IDs/docs-test-files). No store upload; no GitHub Release; no website repo modified.
